title: Junior Business Development Manager at Supertech

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Supertech
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!
